channel.title: French Government on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in French Government on Alien Truth Social

item.title: COMETA Report
item.description:
The COMETA report is an unofficial 1999 publication by the French association COMETA concerning unidentified aerospace phenomena (UAP). Titled “UFOs and Defense: What Should We Prepare For?”, the report compiled UAP/UFO incidents over approximately 60 years, focusing on national defense implications. Contributors included defense experts and former officials from the French Air Force and space agency. The report concluded that a significant percentage of well-documented cases could not be explained by known sources, suggesting the extraterrestrial hypothesis as the most probable explanation for certain phenomena.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/COMETA_report
